markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff of two new clients, Elementum and Spendesk, to the delivery team.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Elementum:** A high-potential client (108 employees, $67M raised) with a CMO building the marketing function from scratch. The goal is brand awareness to attract large deals ($5M+ ARR potential), not pipeline volume.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Spendesk:** A challenging client with high demands (translations, custom design) that were explicitly excluded from the contract. The strategy is to focus Phase 1 on English content while building a French translation pipeline in parallel to prove capability.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [**Kickoff Reschedule:** Both kickoffs are rescheduled to next week due to team availability. Elementum is targeted for Tuesday, Feb 11, and Spendesk for Wednesday, Feb 12.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** The NetRix team structure is being clarified after GrowthX raised concerns. This reinforces the need for prescriptive communication from sales onward to prevent review bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

## Topics

### Elementum: High-Potential Client

  - [**Company Profile:**](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [108 employees, $67M raised (Snowflake Ventures).](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [Platform runs natively inside Snowflake & Databricks.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [**Client Goal:** Brand awareness to attract large deals ($5M+ ARR potential), not pipeline volume.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**Client Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [**Andrew (CMO):** Building marketing from scratch; trusts GrowthX to run the program.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [**CEO:** Attending kickoff to show commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [**Kyle (Founding AE):** Product deep dive contact.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [**Kirkland (Forward-Deployed Engineer):** Confirmed Vercel publishing is easy.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [**GrowthX Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [Drive the kickoff with context from Andrew's sales calls to impress the CEO.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
      - [Be prescriptive to gain control and enable rapid publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [Focus on vendor consolidation as a key content theme.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Spendesk: Challenging Client

  - [**Context:** Client Ali made high demands (translations, custom design) that were explicitly excluded from the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Client Goal:** Improve declining organic traffic and show progress on a multilingual pipeline by the end of Phase 1.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [**Client Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [**Ali (DM):** Expects to push for uncontracted deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - [**Christina (New Hire):** Detail-oriented main POC.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [**GrowthX Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8 weeks):** Focus exclusively on English content for the UK market.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
      - [**Parallel Work:** Build a French translation pipeline using Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
          - [William will personally review 1-2 French articles to prove capability.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
          - [A Loom video will show the French pipeline's backend to build confidence.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** Full multilingual support (French, German) will be offered upon conversion, including hiring dedicated editors.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Kickoff Tactic:** William will highlight his experience building multilingual workflows in Aerox to establish authority.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

### Process Improvement: NetRix Update

  - [**Issue:** Unclear team structure and content review process.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [**Resolution:** GrowthX raised concerns with John (NetRix), who acknowledged the issue and committed to clarifying team roles.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [**Takeaway:** This validates the need for prescriptive communication from sales onward to prevent review bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Schedule Elementum kickoff for Tuesday, Feb 11 (early Pacific time).](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Schedule Spendesk kickoff for Wednesday, Feb 12 (early Pacific time).](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [**William:** Lead the Spendesk kickoff, focusing on the English-first strategy and parallel French pipeline build.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [**Aida:** Lead the Elementum kickoff, leveraging sales call context to impress the CEO.](https://fathom.video/share/tYP_-BFAZ2cxg1yRpKsU7EyZ8PwC68yR?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
